  "findings": [
    "Missed energy source: stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor energy not identified or isolated",
    "Incomplete Lockout/Tagout procedure due to failure to verify zero energy state for all applicable sources"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and ensure personnel are clear of hazardous energy sources",
    "Re-evaluate all energy sources including stored hydraulic pressure, gravitational potential, and capacitive discharge",
    "Apply locks and tags to newly identified energy isolation points",
    "Verify zero energy state through testing before allowing work to resume"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires identification and isolation of all energy sources, including stored energies such as hydraulic, gravity, and capacitors. Failure to identify and control these sources constitutes a critical non-compliance, exposing workers to uncontrolled hazardous energy.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)(i)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)(ii)(D)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)(i)"
  ]
}
